Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad campaigns and extracts the full copy text from every live ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures ad copy across all active campaigns instantly, eliminating the need to manually open and review each ad individually across both platforms.

Meta Investigation.action: Reads through all extracted ad copy and flags any instances where specified phrases or terms are detected, recording the exact field and copy location of each match.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces compliance or messaging issues in seconds with pinpoint accuracy, replacing a manual review process that would take hours across a large ad portfolio.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured report listing every flagged ad with the exact phrase matched, the field it appeared in, and the full copy context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts actionable findings directly in the recipient's inbox with full context, enabling fast review and remediation without logging into any ad platform.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline is moving along strong — we're now tracking **53 total agents**, with **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we welcomed two new additions to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen tool that identifies local businesses needing warehouse or office space and sends warm intro emails for the 13140 Midway Place property, and the **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will analyze and optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both R1 and DFC brands. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** officially moved to **Completed** this week — great work to everyone involved in getting that across the finish line. We'll keep the momentum going as more planned agents move into active development!
